case_title: SIMON & SIMON et al VS AKINS, SOLOMON et al

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT FORD, AYANNA

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SIMON & SIMON OFF PRICE APPAREL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FORD, AYANNA SECRET OASIS &  SIMPLY ELEGANT $1,790.00 PRINCIPAL, $65.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,855.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MISSED, THE ENTIRE BALANCE BECOMES DUE IMMEDIATELY
